constraints.coverage_assumption: The two selected papers are: position 1 = "A Survey on Evaluation of LLM-based Agents" (8b9e2f64d565137ca85ae75029e77fff), position 2 = "Evaluating LLM-based Agents for Multi-Turn Conversations: A Survey" (726cfbbd5683cdfabbf4c24e2bf8f0b2). The user is asking how the second extends / narrows scope of the first.

normalized_question: Explain how "Evaluating LLM-based Agents for Multi-Turn Conversations: A Survey" (second paper) builds on "A Survey on Evaluation of LLM-based Agents" (first paper), grounded in the selected evidence. The explanation should cover how the second extends/specializes the first in scope, taxonomy, perspective, benchmarks, frameworks, methodology, and trends, and is grounded in the comparison_matrix obligations already established for the active deep_comparison task.
